content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

April 30, 2003

Neil Eisenberg
Eisenberg Law Office
The Hobart Building
582 Market Street, Suite 912
San Francisco, CA 94104

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-090

Dear Mr. Eisenberg:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice on the gift provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ Under California Code of Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed, unless you are an authorized representative of San Francisco mayoral candidate Gavin Newsom, for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. However, if you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you have the option of filing a complaint with our Enforcement Division. I have enclosed a fact sheet explaining the complaint process procedure.

Should you have additional questions regarding this matter, please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

JWW:jg
Enclosures

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
